infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sentinel uses the camera to scan visitor QR passes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sentinel uses your location for SOS alerts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Sentinel to use your camera to scan visitor QR passes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Sentinel to use your location for SOS alerts.
